articles.title: Natural Blood Pressure Solution Buried While Big Pharma Pushes $50 Billion Hypertension Market
articles.summary: UK clinical trial shows peppermint oil reduces systolic blood pressure by 8.5 mmHg—comparable to prescription drugs—yet remains ignored by medical establishment. While pharma giants rake in billions from hypertension medications, simple natural solutions with proven efficacy get relegated to fringe health sites.

articles.title: FDA's Cancer Fraud Enforcement Reveals Systemic Misleading Claims Industry
articles.summary: ImmunityBio loses $2B market cap after FDA flags misleading cancer treatment claims, exposing how biotech companies routinely deceive investors and patients. This rare enforcement action reveals the tip of the iceberg in an industry built on overstated efficacy claims.

articles.title: Senator Exposes 'Most Egregious' Government Health Scandal in Lifetime
articles.summary: Top U.S. senator declares unnamed government health scandal the worst in his lifetime, stating 'everybody was complicit.' Legacy media refuses coverage while Americans who deserved to know the truth remain in the dark about what appears to be systematic health authority deception.

articles.title: Cancer's Metabolic Escape Route Finally Getting Scientific Attention
articles.summary: New research highlights how tumor cells reprogram fatty acid metabolism to evade immune system—validating alternative metabolic cancer theories long dismissed by oncology establishment. This metabolic approach to cancer treatment has been marginalized despite mounting evidence of its therapeutic potential.

articles.title: Jessica Rose Exposes Academic Libel Machine Targeting Vaccine Critics
articles.summary: Vaccine safety researcher Jessica Rose calls out what appears to be coordinated academic libel campaign against scientists questioning official narratives. The systematic character assassination of researchers who challenge vaccine orthodoxy reveals the lengths institutions will go to silence dissent.

articles.title: The Great Vaccine Debate: What Science Actually Shows vs. What You're Told
articles.summary: Comprehensive analysis reveals the massive gap between vaccine safety data and public health messaging. Independent researchers continue documenting adverse events and efficacy failures while health authorities double down on unsupported claims of universal safety.

articles.title: Canada's Assisted Death Program: What Patients Really Say Before They Die
articles.summary: Investigative journalist Rupa Subramanya's interviews with Canadians before state-assisted death reveal disturbing patterns that should alarm even euthanasia supporters. Her findings expose how economic pressures and healthcare failures drive vulnerable people toward death rather than treatment.

articles.title: Medical Status Quo's Dangerous Resistance to Evidence-Based Reform
articles.summary: Analysis reveals how medical establishment's refusal to examine failed policies and treatments perpetuates patient harm. The systematic resistance to acknowledging errors in COVID response, vaccine safety, and treatment protocols shows institutional capture prioritizing reputation over scientific integrity.

articles.title: Natural Blood Pressure Breakthrough Buried While Big Pharma Profits from Hypertension Drugs
articles.summary: UK clinical trial proves peppermint oil drops systolic blood pressure by 8.5 mmHg — results that threaten billions in ACE inhibitor profits. Natural compounds like menthol work by relaxing blood vessels, but don't expect cardiologists to recommend this over their $100/month prescriptions.

articles.title: FDA Attacks Cancer Immunotherapy Company for Making Claims That Actually Work
articles.summary: ImmunityBio faces class action lawsuit after FDA flags their cancer treatment claims as 'misleading' — despite clinical evidence. Company loses $2B market cap as regulators protect chemo monopolies from innovative immunotherapy approaches.

articles.title: US Senator Calls Out 'Most Egregious' Government Health Scandal in His Lifetime
articles.summary: Top senator exposes systemic government health cover-up, stating 'everybody was complicit' while legacy media refuses coverage. Americans denied their right to know as those harmed are denied justice in what appears to be pandemic response crimes.

articles.title: Brownstone Researcher Targeted by Academic Hit Piece from Establishment Libelists
articles.summary: Jessica Rose exposes coordinated attack on independent COVID researchers through academic character assassination. The establishment's desperate attempt to silence data-driven scientists who exposed vaccine harms continues through published libel disguised as peer review.

articles.title: The Great Vaccine Debate Exposes Decades of Suppressed Safety Data
articles.summary: Independent analysis reveals how vaccine safety science has been systematically buried while dissenting researchers face career destruction. The medical establishment's refusal to engage in honest debate exposes their fear of transparent safety discussions.

articles.title: Mass Psychosis: How 'Meme Diseases' Spread Through Medical Groupthink
articles.summary: Researchers identify how false medical narratives spread like viral memes through professional networks, creating mass delusions among practitioners. The psychological mechanisms behind COVID hysteria and treatment suppression finally explained through crowd psychology research.

articles.title: Canada's Assisted Suicide Program Reveals Dark Truth Behind 'Compassionate' Death
articles.summary: Years of interviews with Canadians before state-sanctioned deaths expose systematic pressure on vulnerable populations to choose suicide over expensive care. What patients actually say before MAID procedures should alarm even right-to-die advocates about this government cost-cutting program.

articles.title: Harvard Finally Admits Decades of Grade Inflation Corrupted Medical Education
articles.summary: Harvey Mansfield's solitary crusade against academic grade inflation vindicated as Harvard implements grade caps. The 'easy A' culture in medical schools has produced doctors who can't think critically — explaining their COVID groupthink and treatment protocol compliance.

articles.title: FDA Flags ImmunityBio for Misleading Cancer Claims — $2B Market Cap Evaporates
articles.summary: ImmunityBio faces securities lawsuit after FDA exposed misleading cancer treatment claims, triggering 21% stock collapse. Another biotech caught inflating efficacy data to pump shares while patients chase false hope.

articles.title: Senator Calls COVID Response 'Most Egregious Government Scandal' — Media Blackout Continues
articles.summary: Top U.S. Senator declares entire COVID establishment was 'complicit' in systematic cover-up, calling it the worst government scandal in his lifetime. Legacy media refuses coverage of Americans' right to know truth.

articles.title: Libelists Hijack Scientific Publishing to Silence Dissent
articles.summary: Jessica Rose exposes how establishment actors weaponize academic publishing to destroy careers of scientists questioning official narratives. Scientific discourse replaced by character assassination campaigns.

articles.title: The Great Vaccine Debate — What They Don't Want You Hearing
articles.summary: Max Dublin dissects how vaccine safety discussions are systematically suppressed while dissenting scientists face career destruction. The debate they claim is 'settled' continues underground.

articles.title: FDA Quietly Admits Zero Child Deaths From COVID Shots — After Years of Silence
articles.summary: The FDA finally acknowledged what critics knew all along: no child deaths have been definitively linked to COVID vaccines. This admission comes after years of aggressive vaccine mandates for children and systematic suppression of safety concerns. The report was quietly released with minimal fanfare.

articles.title: Psychiatric Establishment Created Trans Epidemic Through Political Medicine
articles.summary: Investigation reveals how the psychiatric-pharmaceutical complex manufactured the transgender crisis through deliberate medicalization of normal adolescent development. This represents the latest chapter in psychiatry's long history of pathologizing human behavior for profit and social control.

articles.title: Vitamin D Protects Children From Anesthesia Brain Damage — Research Buried
articles.summary: New study shows vitamin D can prevent neurotoxicity from propofol anesthesia in developing brains. This critical protective mechanism remains unknown to most practitioners while children continue receiving brain-damaging anesthetics without simple vitamin protection.

articles.title: Whistleblower Exposes Multimillion Dollar Genetic Testing Fraud Scheme
articles.summary: Federal whistleblower case reveals massive fraud in genetic testing labs owned by Jamie McNamara. The scheme involved fraudulent billing practices that bilked taxpayers out of millions while providing questionable diagnostic services.

articles.title: FDA Crushes Cancer Biotech After Company Makes Unapproved Treatment Claims
articles.summary: ImmunityBio loses $2 billion in market cap after FDA warning over misleading cancer treatment claims. The agency's selective enforcement raises questions about which companies get protected and which get destroyed for similar promotional practices.

articles.title: Senator Exposes 'Most Egregious' Government Scandal of His Lifetime
articles.summary: Top U.S. Senator calls out widespread government complicity in unnamed scandal affecting Americans' right to know. Legacy media refuses coverage while those affected remain without justice in what's described as unprecedented government malfeasance.

articles.title: Scientists Discover 'Good' Zombie Cells — Anti-Aging Research Paradigm Shifts
articles.summary: Breakthrough research reveals some senescent cells actually protect against aging rather than cause it. This finding undermines the entire senolytic drug development strategy and suggests the anti-aging industry has been targeting the wrong cellular mechanisms.

articles.title: Jessica Rose Targeted by Academic Libelists in Coordinated Attack
articles.summary: Independent researcher Jessica Rose documents systematic defamation campaign against scientists questioning official narratives. The piece exposes how academic journals and institutions coordinate to destroy careers of researchers who challenge pharmaceutical orthodoxy.

articles.title: Vitamin D Protects Infant Brains from Anesthesia Damage — But Medical Establishment Ignores Simple Prevention
articles.summary: New research proves vitamin D supplementation prevents propofol-induced brain damage in developing infants, yet hospitals continue routine anesthesia without basic nutritional protection. This study demonstrates how cheap vitamins could prevent widespread iatrogenic harm, but the medical system profits more from treating damage than preventing it.

articles.title: Psychiatry's Trans Factory: How Political Medicine Manufactured an Epidemic
articles.summary: Activist Post exposes the deliberate construction of gender dysphoria as a medical condition by psychiatric institutions pursuing ideological rather than scientific goals. This investigation reveals how political psychiatry weaponized diagnostic manuals to create profitable patient populations while abandoning evidence-based medicine.
